_comment: THE BOX for pixel-jam-studio. Hero tools have rich descriptions + additional_search_text and live in hero_tools/. code_scribe.write_game is the Copilot-SDK-style code emitter — it writes a real playable index.html to disk. leaderboard_cabinet.post carries require_approval=always to show approval gating on the ship step.

tools.name: theme_wheel.spin
tools.description: Spin the game-jam theme wheel to pick a wildcard theme for the jam; use when starting a new jam or brainstorming a fresh concept.
tools.additional_search_text: theme prompt wildcard jam idea kickoff brainstorm concept spin the wheel roll a theme

tools.name: asset_studio.generate
tools.description: Generate or pick pixel-art sprites and tiles for the game — the player, enemies, items, background — sized for an HTML5 canvas.
tools.additional_search_text: sprite pixel art tile background character enemy item art assets graphics draw make sprites

tools.name: sfx_foley.pick
tools.description: Pick 8-bit sound effects for jumps, coins, hits, and menu blips; returns short base64 wav-ish blobs the game embeds.
tools.additional_search_text: sfx sound effect blip chirp jump coin hit menu bleep boop audio noise foley

tools.name: chiptune_jukebox.pick
tools.description: Pick a looping chiptune background music track that matches a mood or theme.
tools.additional_search_text: bgm background music soundtrack chiptune loop mood spooky upbeat calm music track

tools.name: code_scribe.write_game
tools.description: Emit a complete playable HTML5 canvas game to disk from a spec (theme, sprites, sfx, bgm, mechanics); this is the Copilot-SDK-style code-writing step that produces the real index.html.
tools.additional_search_text: write code build game generate html5 canvas javascript prototype scaffold emit source file index html playable

tools.name: playtest_arcade.run
tools.description: Headless-playtest the current build: reports FPS, a fun-score, and any crash logs; use after every code change to see if the game is fun and stable.
tools.additional_search_text: playtest test run headless simulate qa fun score fps crash bug does it play is it fun

tools.name: jam_judge.score
tools.description: Score a shipped game on the jam rubric — originality, polish, theme fit — and return a verdict blurb like a jam-site comment.
tools.additional_search_text: judge rubric grade score originality polish theme fit review verdict rating final score

tools.name: leaderboard_cabinet.post
tools.description: Post the finished game to the arcade leaderboard cabinet so other jammers can see it and add their high scores; guarded action that requires jam-lead approval before it goes live.
tools.additional_search_text: submit ship publish leaderboard cabinet post release ship it upload to the arcade

tools.name: theme_wheel.list_past
tools.description: List past themes the wheel has landed on this season.

tools.name: asset_studio.palette_swap
tools.description: Recolor an existing sprite sheet to a new palette.

tools.name: sfx_foley.record_custom
tools.description: Record a custom SFX from a text description.

tools.name: chiptune_jukebox.list_tracks
tools.description: List all available chiptune loops in the jukebox.

tools.name: code_scribe.patch_game
tools.description: Apply a small patch to an already-written game file (bug fix or tuning tweak).

tools.name: playtest_arcade.record_replay
tools.description: Record a video replay of the last playtest run.

tools.name: jam_judge.list_rubric
tools.description: Read the current jam judging rubric.

tools.name: leaderboard_cabinet.top_scores
tools.description: Read the current top scores on the cabinet.

tools.name: devlog.publish_post
tools.description: Publish a devlog entry about the jam.

tools.name: backup.snapshot_build
tools.description: Snapshot the current build to a versioned backup.
